The interest rate charged on all such loans shall not be lower than the rate
charged to the employees.

controls.control_description:
(5) Non-Fund Based (NFB) facility on behalf of a director or his / her related party,
provided that all such facilities shall be fully secured by cash collateral of equivalent or
higher value.

controls.control_description:
Provided that cash collateral would not be mandatory in exposures arising on account of
derivative transactions.

The Board shall have the overall responsibility of ensuring that suitable mechanisms
are put in place for implementation of the policy on lending to related parties by the
AIFI.

controls.control_objective: To ensure contain specific provisions relating to 'lending to related parties' in accordance with the provisions of these directions
controls.control_description:
The credit policy (hereinafter called the policy) of an AIFI, as required in terms of
the extant directions, shall contain specific provisions relating to 'lending to related
parties' in accordance with the provisions of these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to contain specific provisions relating to 'lending to related parties' in accordance with the provisions of these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure <image> prescribe, inter alia, additional safeguards to address the risks emanating from lending to related parties

prescribe, inter alia, additional safeguards to address the risks emanating from
lending to related parties.

of the AIFI and their relatives.

controls.control_objective: To ensure specify aggregate limits for loans towards related parties
controls.control_description: The policy shall specify aggregate limits for loans towards related parties.

controls.control_objective: To ensure be sub-limits for loans to a single related party and a group of related parties
controls.control_description:
Within this
aggregate limit, there shall be sub-limits for loans to a single related party and a
group of related parties.

controls.control_objective: To ensure be within the extant prudential exposure limits prescribed by the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
These limits shall be within the extant prudential exposure
limits prescribed by the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be within the extant prudential exposure limits prescribed by the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be higher than the following ceilings: asset size (in ₹ crore) materiality threshold ceilings > 10,00,000 ₹25 crore ≥ 1,00,000 to up to 10,00,000 ₹10
controls.control_description:
Loans to related parties, which are not prohibited in terms of this Chapter of these
Directions, or which have been exempted from prescribed prohibitions in these
Directions, except (i) credit facilities fully secured by cash or liquid securities and
in accordance to prescribed LTV and valuation norms for such securities and (ii)
Interbank loans, shall be subject to a materiality threshold as per the credit policy,
which shall not be higher than the following ceilings:
Asset Size (in ₹ crore) Materiality Threshold Ceilings
> 10,00,000 ₹25 crore
≥ 1,00,000 to up to 10,00,000 ₹10 crore
Less than 100,000 ₹5 crore
Asset size based on the last audited balance sheet.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to be higher than the following ceilings: asset size (in ₹ crore) materiality threshold ceilings > 10,00,000 ₹25 crore ≥ 1,00,000 to up to 10,00,000 ₹10

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply at individual transaction level
controls.control_description: For loans, materiality threshold shall apply at individual transaction level.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply at individual transaction level

controls.control_objective: To ensure vary for different categories of loan to related parties and borrowers as per the aifi's policy
controls.control_description:
Materiality thresholds may vary for different categories of loan to related parties and
borrowers as per the AIFI's policy.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to vary for different categories of loan to related parties and borrowers as per the aifi's policy

controls.control_objective: To ensure be sanctioned either by the board or the 'committee on lending to related parties' of the aifi
controls.control_description:
All loans above the prescribed materiality threshold shall be sanctioned either by the
Board or the 'Committee on Lending to Related Parties' of the AIFI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be sanctioned either by the board or the 'committee on lending to related parties' of the aifi

controls.control_objective: To ensure recuse themselves from deliberations and decision on loan proposals, or contracts and arrangements, involving themselves or their related parties
controls.control_description:
Directors, KMP, or 'specified employees' shall recuse themselves from deliberations
and decision on loan proposals, or contracts and arrangements, involving
themselves or their related parties.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to recuse themselves from deliberations and decision on loan proposals, or contracts and arrangements, involving themselves or their related parties

controls.control_description:
Such recusal shall also extend to deliberations
and decisions relating to any subsequent material changes to the terms of such
loans, including one-time settlements, write-offs, waivers, enforcement of security,
implementation of resolution plans, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also extend to deliberations and decisions relating to any subsequent material changes to the terms of such loans, including one-time settlements, wri

controls.control_description:
An AIFI shall put in place a suitable mechanism for maintaining and periodically
updating the list of all the related persons, and the related parties thereof, as well
as the loans sanctioned by the AIFI to such related persons and related parties.

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reported to the board on an annual basis
controls.control_description:
Credit facilities sanctioned to 'specified employees' and their relatives shall be
reported to the Board on an annual basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reported to the board on an annual basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure be conducted at quarterly or shorter intervals by internal auditors to check, inter alia, whether guidelines and procedures in relation to loans to re
controls.control_description:
Periodic reviews shall be conducted at quarterly or shorter intervals by internal
auditors to check, inter alia, whether guidelines and procedures in relation to loans
to related parties are being adhered to or not.

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reported to the audit committee of the board
controls.control_description:
Any deviation from the policy relating to lending to related parties and reasons
therefor shall be reported to the Audit Committee of the Board.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reported to the audit committee of the board

controls.control_objective: To ensure always be treated as lending to related party
controls.control_description:
Any product, entity or structure formed with the objective of circumventing these
Directions through various means, such as reciprocal lending or quid pro quo
arrangements, and identified as such by the auditors of the AIFI or by the
supervisory authority and investigating agencies shall always be treated as lending
to related party.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to always be treated as lending to related party

Any non-compliance with and circumvention of these Directions shall result in

Bank.

audits, and restrictions or any other supervisory and enforcement actions as

Primary (Urban) Co-operative Banks) and Financial Institutions (All India Financial
Institutions and NBFCs (including HFCs)) obtain LEI codes.

based (credit as well as investment) exposure of banks / FIs to the borrower.

reckoned for the purpose.

borrower.

controls.control_objective: To ensure be sanctioned any new exposure nor shall they be granted renewal / enhancement of any existing exposure
controls.control_description:
Borrowers who fail to obtain LEI codes from an authorised Local Operating Unit (LOU)
shall not be sanctioned any new exposure nor shall they be granted renewal /
enhancement of any existing exposure.

controls.control_objective: To ensure be exempted from this provision
controls.control_description:
However, Departments / Agencies of Central
and State Governments (not Public Sector Undertakings registered under Companies
Act or established as Corporation under the relevant statute) shall be exempted from
this provision.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be exempted from this provision

controls.control_objective: To ensure encourage large borrowers to obtain lei for their parent entity as well as all subsidiaries and associates
controls.control_description:
An AIFI shall encourage large borrowers to obtain LEI for their parent entity as well
as all subsidiaries and associates.

controls.control_description:
In India, LEI code may be obtained from Legal
Entity Identifier India Ltd (LEIIL), a subsidiary of the Clearing Corporation of India
Limited (CCIL), which has been recognised by the Reserve Bank as issuer of LEI
under the Payment and Settlement Systems Act, 2007 and is accredited by the GLEIF
as the Local Operating Unit (LOU) in India for issuance and management of LEI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be obtained from legal entity identifier india ltd (leiil), a subsidiary of the clearing corporation of india limited (ccil), which has been recognise

controls.control_objective: To ensure also ensure that borrowers renew the codes as per gleif guidelines
controls.control_description:
After obtaining LEI code, an AIFI shall also ensure that borrowers renew the codes
as per GLEIF guidelines.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to also ensure that borrowers renew the codes as per gleif guidelines

controls.control_objective: To ensure be available for search by any lender or any other person desirous of dealing with the property
controls.control_description:
The records
maintained by the Central Registry shall be available for search by any lender or any
other person desirous of dealing with the property.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be available for search by any lender or any other person desirous of dealing with the property

controls.control_objective: To ensure be noted that under the provisions of section 23 of the sarfaesi act, every transaction of security interest is required to be filed with the registry
controls.control_description:
It may be noted that under the provisions of Section 23 of the SARFAESI
Act, every transaction of security interest is required to be filed with the Registry.

controls.control_objective: To ensure be permitted to extend working capital finance
controls.control_description:
An AIFI shall not be permitted to extend working capital finance, unless
specifically permitted by the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be permitted to extend working capital finance

controls.control_objective: To ensure be permitted to extend working capital when banks are not in a position to meet the credit requirements of the counterparty concerned on account of te
controls.control_description:
Provided that the AIFI shall be permitted to extend working capital when banks are
not in a position to meet the credit requirements of the counterparty concerned on
account of temporary liquidity constraints.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be permitted to extend working capital when banks are not in a position to meet the credit requirements of the counterparty concerned on account of te

controls.control_objective: To ensure obtain an auditor's certificate indicating the extent of funds already borrowed, before considering the request for further working capital finance
controls.control_description:
Provided further that in case of a counterparty whose working capital is financed
under multiple banking arrangement (MBAs), the AIFI shall obtain an auditor's
certificate indicating the extent of funds already borrowed, before considering the
request for further working capital finance.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to obtain an auditor's certificate indicating the extent of funds already borrowed, before considering the request for further working capital finance

controls.control_objective: To ensure be permitted to extend revolving underwriting facility to short term floating rate notes / bonds or debentures issued by companies
controls.control_description:
An AIFI shall not be permitted to extend revolving underwriting facility to Short
Term Floating Rate Notes / Bonds or Debentures issued by companies.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be permitted to extend revolving underwriting facility to short term floating rate notes / bonds or debentures issued by companies

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The Directions,
instructions and guidelines already repealed shall continue to remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken, or
initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall continue to
be governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or acknowledgments granted
under these repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline
controls.control_description:
and
any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted, continued,
or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if
those directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of
the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being
in force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order to
remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these
<image>
Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary clarifications
in respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any provision of
these Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding
